login.title: PLT Admin
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your portfolio

products.description: Manage app shortcuts displayed on the homepage. Drag rows to change their order.
products.reorderHint: Drag the handle to reorder shortcuts on the homepage.
products.reorderError: Could not save the new order. Please try again.
products.newDescription: Add an app shortcut to the homepage grid.
products.requiredFields: ID, title, and app URL are required.

form.titleHint: Shown below the icon on the homepage grid.
form.footerIncomplete: Fill in the required fields to continue.

preview.title: Live preview
preview.description: How this shortcut appears on the homepage.

checklist.heading: Before saving
checklist.title: App name added
checklist.ready: Looks good — you can save now.

errors.urlInvalid: Enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://.
errors.idInvalid: ID can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

basics.title: Basics
basics.description: Name and display order for the app shortcut.

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Upload an image or paste an external icon URL.

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: How the product is categorized and ordered in the catalog.

tagsHighlights.title: Tags & highlights
tagsHighlights.description: Tags as comma-separated text; highlights as an editable list.

media.title: Media
media.description: First image is used as the cover in listings.

links.title: App link
links.description: URL opened in a new tab when visitors click the shortcut.

fields.idHint: URL-safe identifier. Leave empty to generate from title.
fields.title: Title
fields.shortDescriptionHint: One or two sentences for cards and listings.
fields.longDescriptionHint: Full overview for the featured product panel.
fields.featuredProductHint: Show in the sticky scroll section on the homepage.
fields.tagsHint: Technologies or themes, e.g. React, PostgreSQL
fields.highlightsHint: Shown in the featured scroll panel — one point per row.
fields.highlightsEmpty: No highlights yet. Add key selling points for featured products.

contacts.description: Contact submissions from the public portfolio site.
contacts.deleteConfirm: Delete submission from "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
contacts.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} submission(s)? This cannot be undone.

imageUploader.dropHint: Drop images here or click to upload
imageUploader.formats: PNG, JPG, WebP — max 5 MB each
imageUploader.clickCoverHint: Click an image to set it as the cover.
